member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Core.Program
member.summary: Application entry point. Configures Windows Forms and launches the main stopwatch window.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.Program.Main
member.summary: The method where the program starts running.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState
member.summary: The possible states the stopwatch can be in at any moment.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState.Idle
member.summary: The stopwatch has not been started, or has been reset.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState.Running
member.summary: The stopwatch is currently counting up.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState.Paused
member.summary: The stopwatch is temporarily paused.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState.Stopped
member.summary: The stopwatch has been stopped.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine
member.summary: Handles all stopwatch timing and state logic. It counts elapsed seconds using a one-second timer and raises events so a user interface can update without containing any timing logic itself.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine._timer
member.summary: The timer that fires once every second.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine._totalSeconds
member.summary: The total number of seconds counted so far.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine._state
member.summary: The current state of the stopwatch.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine._disposed
member.summary: Tracks whether this object has already been disposed.

member.name: E:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.TimerTick
member.summary: Raised every second with the current time as a formatted string, so the UI can refresh its display.

member.name: E:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.StateChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever the stopwatch changes state, so the UI can react (for example, by enabling or disabling buttons).

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new stopwatch engine in the Idle state with the timer set to tick once per second.

member.name: P:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.State
member.summary: Gets the current state of the stopwatch.

member.name: P:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.TotalSeconds
member.summary: Gets the total elapsed seconds counted so far.

member.name: P:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.FormattedTime
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time formatted as hh:mm:ss.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Start
member.summary: Starts the stopwatch from 00:00:00.
member.exception: Thrown if the stopwatch is already running or is paused.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Pause
member.summary: Pauses the stopwatch and returns the current time.
member.returns: The current elapsed time formatted as hh:mm:ss.
member.exception: Thrown if the stopwatch is not currently running.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Resume
member.summary: Resumes the stopwatch from the time at which it was paused.
member.exception: Thrown if the stopwatch is not currently paused.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Reset
member.summary: Resets the stopwatch back to 00:00:00 and returns it to the Idle state. Notifies subscribers so the display shows zero.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Stop
member.summary: Stops the stopwatch completely and returns the last recorded time.
member.returns: The final elapsed time formatted as hh:mm:ss.
member.exception: Thrown if the stopwatch is neither running nor paused.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.OnTimerElapsed(System.Object,System.Timers.ElapsedEventArgs)
member.summary: Runs once per second while the timer is active. Increments the elapsed seconds and notifies subscribers of the new time.
member.param: The timer that raised the event.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.SetState(StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState)
member.summary: Updates the current state and notifies subscribers of the change.
member.param: The new state to switch to.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.FormatTime(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a number of seconds into an hh:mm:ss string.
member.returns: The time formatted as hh:mm:ss with zero-padding.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the resources used by the stopwatch (the underlying timer).

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchEngine.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases resources used by the stopwatch.
member.param: true when called directly; stops and disposes the timer.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm
member.summary: The graphical window for the stopwatch. It displays the elapsed time and provides Start, Pause, Resume, Reset, and Stop buttons. All timing logic lives in ; this form only shows the time and forwards button clicks to the engine.

member.name: F:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm._engine
member.summary: The engine that does the actual timing and state handling.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.#ctor
member.summary: Builds the window, lays out the controls, and subscribes to the engine's events.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.ConfigureButton(System.Windows.Forms.Button,System.String,System.Int32,System.EventHandler)
member.summary: Sets up a button's text, position, and click handler.
member.param: The label shown on the button.
The method to run when the button is clicked.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.StartClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Starts the stopwatch from 00:00:00.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.PauseClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Pauses the stopwatch and shows the current time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.ResumeClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Resumes the stopwatch from the paused time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.ResetClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Resets the stopwatch back to 00:00:00.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.StopClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Stops the stopwatch and shows the last recorded time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.Run(System.Action)
member.summary: Runs an engine action, turning any invalid-state error into a status message instead of letting the program crash.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.OnTimerTick(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the time label every second. Marshals back onto the UI thread because the engine's timer fires on a background thread.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.OnStateChanged(System.Object,StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState)
member.summary: Enables or disables buttons whenever the engine's state changes, so only valid actions are clickable.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchForm.UpdateButtons(StopwatchApp.Core.StopwatchState)
member.summary: Turns each button on or off to match the current stopwatch state.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Core.ApplicationConfiguration
member.summary: Bootstrap the application configuration.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Core.ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize
